emails.example_sentence: I'm just following up on my previous email about the deployment.
emails.example_translation: Len nadväzujem na môj predchádzajúci email ohľadom nasadenia.

emails.example_sentence: Could you kindly review the pull request when you have a moment?
emails.example_translation: Mohol by si láskavo skontrolovať pull request, keď budeš mať chvíľu?

emails.example_sentence: I'm writing regarding the API outage we had yesterday.
Please find the architecture diagram attached.
Just a heads-up: the staging server will be down tonight.
emails.example_translation: Len upozornenie: staging server bude dnes večer nedostupný.

emails.example_sentence: Let me know if you need additional context on this ticket.
emails.example_translation: Daj vedieť, ak potrebuješ ďalší kontext k tomuto ticketu.

emails.example_sentence: We need a fix for the auth bug ASAP.
emails.example_translation: Potrebujeme opravu auth bugu čo najskôr.

emails.example_sentence: Let me loop in the security team on this thread.
emails.example_translation: Pridám do tejto diskusie security tím.

emails.example_sentence: Let's circle back on this after the sprint review.
emails.example_translation: Vráťme sa k tomu po sprint review.

emails.example_sentence: I'd really appreciate your feedback on the design doc.
emails.example_translation: Naozaj by som ocenil tvoj feedback na design dokument.

emails.example_sentence: As discussed in our 1:1, I'll take ownership of the migration.
emails.example_translation: Ako sme sa dohodli na 1:1, prevezmem zodpovednosť za migráciu.

emails.example_sentence: The deadline for the MVP is end of next sprint.
emails.example_translation: Termín pre MVP je koniec budúceho sprintu.

emails.example_sentence: There are two outstanding comments on the PR.
emails.example_translation: Na PR sú dva nevybavené komentáre.

standups.example_sentence: My main blocker is waiting for the staging credentials.
standups.example_translation: Moja hlavná prekážka je čakanie na staging údaje.

standups.example_sentence: I'm wrapping up the user profile endpoint today.
standups.example_translation: Dnes dokončujem endpoint pre user profile.

standups.example_sentence: We'll kick off the refactor in the next sprint.
Can we sync after standup about the schema change?
standups.example_translation: Môžeme si dať sync po standupe ohľadom zmeny schémy?

standups.example_sentence: The migration script is in progress, should land tomorrow.
standups.example_translation: Migračný skript je rozpracovaný, mal by byť hotový zajtra.

standups.example_sentence: I can pick up the bug ticket if no one else has bandwidth.
standups.example_translation: Môžem prevziať bug ticket, ak nikto iný nemá kapacitu.

standups.example_sentence: I don't have bandwidth for code review this afternoon.
standups.example_translation: Dnes popoludní nemám kapacitu na code review.

standups.example_sentence: Let's do a spike to evaluate which queue library fits best.
standups.example_translation: Urobme spike na vyhodnotenie, ktorá queue knižnica sa hodí najviac.

standups.example_sentence: I'll carry over the integration tests to next sprint.
standups.example_translation: Integračné testy si prenesiem do budúceho sprintu.

standups.example_sentence: My estimate for the feature is around three days.
standups.example_translation: Môj odhad na tú featuru sú asi tri dni.

standups.example_sentence: The scope of this ticket grew, I'll split it tomorrow.
standups.example_translation: Rozsah ticketu narástol, zajtra ho rozdelím.

standups.example_sentence: I'm waiting on dependencies from the backend team.
standups.example_translation: Čakám na závislosti od backend tímu.

standups.example_sentence: I got stuck on a flaky test, going to pair on it.
standups.example_translation: Zasekol som sa na nestabilnom teste, idem na to v pári.

code_review.example_sentence: Nit: prefer const over let here.
code_review.example_translation: Drobná pripomienka: tu radšej použi const namiesto let.

code_review.example_sentence: LGTM, just one optional suggestion below.
code_review.example_translation: LGTM, len jeden voliteľný návrh nižšie.

code_review.example_sentence: What happens in the edge case where the array is empty?
code_review.example_translation: Čo sa stane v okrajovom prípade, keď je pole prázdne?

code_review.example_sentence: We could refactor this into a smaller helper function.
code_review.example_translation: Toto by sme mohli refaktorovať do menšej pomocnej funkcie.

code_review.example_sentence: There's a leftover console.log in the diff.
Let's keep the naming consistent with the rest of the module.
code_review.example_translation: Zachovajme názvy konzistentné so zvyškom modulu.

code_review.example_sentence: This null check is redundant — the type already guarantees it.
code_review.example_translation: Táto null kontrola je nadbytočná — typ ju už zaručuje.

code_review.example_sentence: There's a trade-off between readability and performance here.
code_review.example_translation: Tu je kompromis medzi čitateľnosťou a výkonom.

code_review.example_sentence: That's out of scope for this PR — let's open a follow-up.
code_review.example_translation: To je mimo rozsahu tohto PR — otvorme follow-up.

code_review.example_sentence: I'll approve once the failing test is fixed.
code_review.example_translation: Schválim, keď bude padajúci test opravený.

code_review.example_sentence: Could you rebase? There's a merge conflict in package-lock.
code_review.example_translation: Mohol by si urobiť rebase? V package-lock je merge conflict.

code_review.example_sentence: We can reduce boilerplate by extracting this into a hook.
code_review.example_translation: Šablónový kód môžeme zredukovať vytiahnutím do hooku.

code_review.example_sentence: I think there's a race condition between the two requests.
code_review.example_translation: Myslím, že medzi tými dvoma requestmi je race condition.

architecture.example_sentence: We need a scalable solution that handles peak traffic.
architecture.example_translation: Potrebujeme škálovateľné riešenie pre špičkové vyťaženie.

architecture.example_sentence: Let's decouple the payment service from the order service.
architecture.example_translation: Oddeľme payment service od order service.

architecture.example_sentence: We need to measure throughput under realistic load.
architecture.example_translation: Potrebujeme zmerať priepustnosť pri reálnej záťaži.

architecture.example_sentence: Adding a cache reduced p99 latency by 40%.
architecture.example_translation: Pridanie cache znížilo p99 latenciu o 40%.

architecture.example_sentence: The database is the bottleneck under heavy writes.
architecture.example_translation: Databáza je úzke miesto pri intenzívnom zápise.

architecture.example_sentence: The system should be fault tolerant if one node dies.
architecture.example_translation: Systém by mal byť odolný voči chybám, ak vypadne jeden node.

architecture.example_sentence: We accept eventual consistency between the regions.
We throttle requests to 100 per second per user.
architecture.example_translation: Obmedzujeme requesty na 100 za sekundu na užívateľa.

architecture.example_sentence: The fan-out from this event causes too many downstream calls.
architecture.example_translation: Rozvetvenie z tejto udalosti spôsobuje príliš veľa downstream volaní.

architecture.example_sentence: Make sure the retry handler is idempotent.
architecture.example_translation: Zabezpeč, aby retry handler bol idempotentný.

architecture.example_sentence: Stateless services are easier to scale horizontally.
architecture.example_translation: Bezstavové služby sa ľahšie horizontálne škálujú.

architecture.example_sentence: We need a quick rollback path for the migration.
architecture.example_translation: Potrebujeme rýchlu cestu pre rollback migrácie.

architecture.example_sentence: If the recommender is down, we fall back to graceful degradation.
architecture.example_translation: Ak je recommender vypnutý, padáme do elegantne zhoršeného režimu.

interview.example_sentence: Walk me through how you'd design a URL shortener.
interview.example_translation: Preveď ma tým, ako by si navrhol URL shortener.

interview.example_sentence: What trade-offs did you consider when picking that database?
interview.example_translation: Aké kompromisy si zvažoval pri výbere tej databázy?

interview.example_sentence: I'd like to highlight a project where I led the migration.
interview.example_translation: Rád by som vyzdvihol projekt, kde som viedol migráciu.

interview.example_sentence: The biggest challenge was reducing the deploy time.
interview.example_translation: Najväčšou výzvou bolo skrátiť čas deploymentu.

interview.example_sentence: I took ownership of the on-call rotation last year.
interview.example_translation: Minulý rok som prevzal zodpovednosť za on-call rotáciu.

interview.example_sentence: The change had a measurable impact on conversion.
interview.example_translation: Tá zmena mala merateľný dopad na konverziu.

interview.example_sentence: I aligned with stakeholders before starting the redesign.
interview.example_translation: Pred začatím redizajnu som zladil so stakeholdermi.

interview.example_sentence: We leveraged existing infrastructure to ship faster.
interview.example_translation: Využili sme existujúcu infraštruktúru pre rýchlejší release.

interview.example_sentence: When unsure, I fall back on writing more tests.
interview.example_translation: Keď si nie som istý, vrátim sa k písaniu viac testov.

interview.example_sentence: One weakness is that I sometimes over-engineer solutions.
interview.example_translation: Jedna slabá stránka je, že niekedy preinžinierujem riešenia.

interview.example_sentence: My background is in distributed systems.
interview.example_translation: Moje pozadie je v distribuovaných systémoch.

interview.example_sentence: It took me two weeks to ramp up on the codebase.
interview.example_translation: Trvalo mi dva týždne zapracovať sa do kódu.

mixed.example_sentence: We shipped the feature behind a flag last week.
mixed.example_translation: Minulý týždeň sme vydali featuru za flagom.

mixed.example_sentence: We'll do a gradual rollout to 10% of users first.
mixed.example_translation: Najprv urobíme postupné nasadenie na 10% užívateľov.

mixed.example_sentence: The new UI is behind a feature flag for now.
mixed.example_translation: Nové UI je zatiaľ za feature flagom.

mixed.example_sentence: We need to pay down some tech debt this quarter.
mixed.example_translation: Tento kvartál musíme splatiť časť technického dlhu.

mixed.example_sentence: That commit regressed the checkout flow.
mixed.example_translation: Ten commit spôsobil regresiu v checkout flow.

mixed.example_sentence: A rough estimate would be two weeks of work.
mixed.example_translation: Hrubý odhad by boli dva týždne práce.

mixed.example_sentence: Caching is the low-hanging fruit for performance.
mixed.example_translation: Cache je ľahko dosiahnuteľný spôsob, ako zlepšiť výkon.

mixed.example_sentence: Let's do due diligence before adopting the new framework.
mixed.example_translation: Urobme si dôkladnú previerku, než prijmeme nový framework.
